hooks.command:
printf 'vimyasa repo — multi-lane Claude Code workflow.

• Read docs/WORKFLOW.md to identify your lane (features / aesthetics / themes / coordination) and the rules for parallel work.
• Read docs/BACKLOG.md for triaged priorities and what is in-flight in other lanes.
• Read docs/architecture/ for load-bearing context (theme system, prewarm pattern, vibrancy gotcha, parallel-instance flicker).

If you do not know which lane this session is, ask the human before editing src/.

If the human asks you for out-of-lane work, push back once with the right lane and reason; do it on the second ask and disclose. See WORKFLOW.md > "When asked to do work outside your lane".
'
